name: accounting-ai-agent
description: Canonical pnpm workspace for the Accounting AI Agent desktop UI, shared UI package, and frontend tooling.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/ui build && pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/ts-sdk build && pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/desktop-ui build
scripts.contracts:check: pnpm run contracts:generate && git diff --exit-code -- packages/ts-sdk/src/generated/openapi.ts
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/ui lint && pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/ts-sdk lint && pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/desktop-ui lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/ts-sdk typecheck && pnpm --filter @accounting-ai-agent/desktop-ui typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm format:check
